title: 3D Designer #78931
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Retail Advertising Service Provider
  • Position Title: 3D Designer
  • Working Location: Central – Potong Pasir
  • Working Hours: 5 days / Mon-Fri: 9am-6pm
  • Salary Package: Basic Salary + Performance Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Conceptualize bold and strategic design solutions for retail spaces, events, product launches, and brand activations.
  • Produce high-quality layouts, 3D renders, mockups, and final artwork for both digital and print applications.
  • Apply a strong understanding of visual merchandising, in-store branding, and spatial planning in design execution.
  • Collaborate closely with internal teams (production, marketing, installation) and external partners to ensure smooth project implementation.
  • Stay current with retail and design trends, integrating relevant insights into creative development.
  • Prepare accurate, print-ready artwork and coordinate with vendors to ensure high-quality production and installation.
  • Manage multiple design projects simultaneously while maintaining high standards of creativity and brand alignment.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Min. ITE qualification.
  • Min 2 years of experience designing for retail environments, including in-store branding, visual merchandising, and store displays.
  • Experience working on projects involving both creative design and physical execution, collaborating with fabrication or installation teams is a plus.
  • Proven track record leading or significantly contributing to retail design campaigns from concept to execution.
  • Competent with 3D visualization tools such as SketchUp, 3Ds Max, or similar software.
  • Experience preparing final artwork for print and production, including die lines, color proofing, and specifications.

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #78931 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
